meta.title: Dale Peterson S4x17 Keynote Come Together
meta.description:
Dale Peterson kicks off S4x17 in Miami Beach with an explanation of why he is now optimistic about ICS  / SCADA Security. After a lost decade after 9/11, the vendors and asset owners are moving to systems that can be secured.

Dale then explains the importance of the ICS Community coming together with three different groups

1) Operations Technology and IT
2) Operations and Senior Management (C-Levels and Board of Directors)
3) ICS and related fields such as economics, political and conflict theory, psychology and more

The ICS security community is still small and needs to avoid falling into the trap of being petty and insular. We need to encourage and embrace these groups who have not been part of the problem to help us with the solution.
